title: Front Office Manager - Rajasthan Tourism - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Rajasthan Tourism - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Rajasthan Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Rajasthan Tourism:
Rajasthan Tourism is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajasthan Tourism!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
